7mate.title: Pawn Stars
7mate.synopsis: The Pawn Stars are presented with a very expensive item - sunken treasure from the Taj Mahal dynasty. Will they break the bank to plunder the prize, or let it sink back down to the deep?

7mate.synopsis: The show follows the trail of the special K9 Police Unit.

7mate.synopsis: Corey and Chum meet an outspoken Pez collector looking to sell 50 pieces of classic Americana. Will Corey click out some serious cash for these collectibles or will he get his sugar fix somewhere else?
